series_metadata.series_title: Acquisitions Management Rate/Budget Documentation & Transfer File
series_metadata.series_description: This series consists of copies of rate setting documents; expense reports; working papers on budget documentation; allotment encumbrance detail; the transfer of the unit from computer services to office services.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office area one (1) fiscal year, transfer to storage for two (2) fiscal years, then destroy., Paper: Wastepaper
